ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] (Old Testament) Act out a memorable Bible reading from the term.
[ ] (Old Testament) Act out the story of Moses.
[ ] (New Testament) Begin working on a "picture biography" of Jesus using your own brush drawings or fine art prints.
[ ] (New Testament) Act out one of the miracles of Jesus.

[ ] (Bible) Visit a museum of antiquities to see artifacts from the time of Christ.
[ ] (Bible) Learn the names of the books of the Bible. ["The Best Books of the Bible"](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=powlzb2Rfdw&ab_channel=JumpStart3) song can help.
[ ] (Old Testament) Retell a memorable Bible reading from the term to a family member or friend.
[ ] (New Testament) Continue working on a "picture biography" of Jesus using your own brush drawings or fine art prints.
[ ] (New Testament) Act out one of the miracles of Jesus.

[ ] (Bible) Visit a museum of antiquities to see artifacts from the time of Christ.
[ ] (Bible) Learn the names of the books of the Bible. ["The Best Books of the Bible"](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=powlzb2Rfdw&ab_channel=JumpStart3) song can help.
[ ] (Old Testament) Retell a memorable Bible reading from the term to a family member or friend.
[ ] (New Testament) Continue working on a "picture biography" of Jesus using your own brush drawings or fine art prints.
[ ] (New Testament) Act out one of the miracles of Jesus.
